title: Latest Job Vacancies at Djinni
description: Stay updated with the newest job opportunities at Djinni.

items.title: Experienced Frontend Developer
items.content_html:
About Us
At Huuray, we make gifting smarter — helping companies and individuals send digital gift cards and rewards across the world. We’re growing fast and are now looking for an experienced Frontend Developer to join our team and help us craft beautiful, scalable, and
high-performance user interfaces across our platforms. We already have talented team members based in Kyiv, and we’re excited to expand our presence by adding another skilled developer to collaborate closely with them.

What You’ll Do
• Develop and maintain responsive, high-quality web applications for our gift and reward
platforms.
• Work closely with our design team and backend developers to build seamless, user-focused
solutions.
• Collaborate with product managers to create exceptional user experiences.
• Implement reusable, testable components with modern frontend frameworks and libraries.
• Perform cross-browser and cross-device testing to ensure consistency and reliability.
• Help perform QA testing of final product releases to maintain quality and stability.
• Optimize performance and ensure accessibility compliance.
• Participate in code reviews, and help define best practices and UI standards.

Your Tech Toolbox
• Next.js
• JavaScript (ES6+)
• HTML5 & CSS3
• jQuery / jQuery UI
• Version control (Git)
• Frontend frameworks/libraries
• Cross-browser and cross-device testing tools
What We’re Looking For
• 3+ years of experience as a Frontend Developer.
• English Speaking/Writing.
• Solid understanding of JavaScript and modern frameworks (ex. React, Next.js, Vue).
• Strong experience with responsive design and modern web standards (HTML5, CSS3, JS).
• Knowledge of performance optimization and accessibility best practices.
• Comfortable working with APIs and integrating data from backend systems.
• Proficient in Git-based workflows (branches, pull requests, code reviews).
• Passion for clean, maintainable code and user-friendly design.

Nice to Have
• Knowledge of Bootstrap and familiarity with .NET environments.
• Basic knowledge of Adobe packages (e.g., Photoshop, Illustrator, XD).
• Experience with TypeScript, GraphQL, or headless CMSs.
• Familiarity with analytics, SEO, and conversion optimization.
• Knowledge of AI solutions aimed for helping frontend work.

Why Join Us
• Work remotely with flexibility, preferably based around Kyiv.
• Join a company that already has team members in Kyiv, making collaboration seamless.
• Be part of a dynamic, fast-growing international company.
• Help build a product that brings joy to people around the world.
• Competitive compensation and a collaborative, idea-driven environment.

items.title: Senior Frontend Engineer (Vue 3 / TypeScript)
items.content_html:
N-iX is looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer to join the fast-growing team on our project! Our customer is a leading European AI company developing large language models and generative platforms for enterprise and government clients. 

 

As a Senior Frontend Engineer, you will take ownership of building scalable, accessible, and high-quality user interfaces, including chat-based AI experiences. You will work closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver inclusive, reliable, and maintainable frontend systems.

 

 

Responsibilities:

  • Design, build, and maintain frontend applications using Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, and Vite
  • Own and promote Accessibility (A11y) standards, ensuring inclusive user experiences
  • Develop and maintain chat-based user interfaces integrated with backend APIs
  • Write and maintain End-to-End tests using Playwright
  • Work within a Nx monorepo and contribute to frontend architecture decisions
  • Ensure high code quality through reviews, testing, and best practices
  • Optimize performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability
  • Collaborate closely with designers, backend engineers, and product managers
  •  

Requirements:

  • 4+ years of professional frontend development experience (most of which should have been in a production setup with real customers)
  • Strong expertise in Vue.js (Vue 3) and TypeScript
  • Proven experience implementing accessibility (A11y) standards
  • Experience with state management (Pinia or similar)
  • Solid experience with E2E testing (Playwright or equivalent)
  • Strong CSS skills and experience with responsive design
  • Experience working in monorepo environments (Nx or similar)
  • Ability to take ownership and contribute at an architectural level

 

 

Nice to have:

  • Experience building chat, messaging, or real-time interfaces
  • Familiarity with WebSockets, SSE, or real-time data flows
  • Experience with AI-powered user interfaces
  • Experience with design systems or component libraries
  • Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and frontend performance optimization
  •  

Technology Stack:

  • Frontend: Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, Vite
  • Testing: Playwright (E2E), unit & integration testing
  • Architecture: Nx monorepo
  • UI & Styling: Modern CSS, responsive design, accessibility-first approach (A11y)
  • Integration: REST APIs, real-time interfaces (WebSockets / SSE – nice to have)
  • Tooling & Workflow: Git, CI/CD pipelines, code reviews, automated testing
  • Standards: Accessibility (WCAG), performance optimization, maintainable frontend architecture

 

 

We offer*:

  • Flexible working format – remote, office-based, or hybrid
  • Competitive salary and compensation package
  • Personalized career growth
  • Professional development tools (mentorship programs, tech talks, trainings, centers of excellence)
  • Active tech communities with regular knowledge sharing
  • Education reimbursement
  • Memorable anniversary presents
  • Corporate events and team buildings
  • Other location-specific benefits

*Not applicable for freelancers

items.title: Python Developer (Full stack з TypeScript)
items.content_html:
Ми шукаємо Python Developer (Fullstack з TypeScript), який долучиться до команди для роботи над новим проєктом та відповідатиме переважно за розробку backend-частини рішення.
 

Проєкт передбачає використання LLM та AI-рішень, що потребують продуманого підходу до архітектури, інтеграцій і побудови масштабованих сервісів. У межах ролі — участь у формуванні технічних рішень, розробці серверної логіки, інтеграції з AI/ML-компонентами та підтримці frontend-частини (у меншому обсязі).
 

Тривалість залучення — від 3 місяців із можливістю продовження співпраці.
 

Вимоги:

  • Від 4 років комерційного досвіду роботи з Python;
  • Від 1 року досвіду роботи з TypeScript;
  • Практичний досвід роботи з LLM або ML/AI API, включно з мультиагентними рішеннями на основі LLM;
  • Глибоке розуміння масштабованої backend-архітектури;
  • Практичний досвід роботи з GCP;
  • Розуміння налаштувань CI/CD;
  • Впевнені знання SQL, включно з шифруванням даних та найкращими практиками безпеки;
  • Експертиза у принципах ООП та побудові програмної архітектури;
  • Базові знання AI-концепцій.
     

Обов’язки:

  • Розробка backend-сервісів та ключової логіки продукту на Python;
  • Інтеграція та конфігурація LLM-моделей;
  • Налаштування CI/CD-процесів;
  • Виконання невеликих задач на TypeScript для візуалізації даних з backend;
  • Співпраця з командою над архітектурою та розробкою основних системних компонентів.
     

Ми пропонуємо:

  • Дружню та високопрофесійну команду;
  • Демократичне управління;
  • Конкурентну заробітну плату;
  • Уроки англійської мови;
  • Сучасний та комфортний офіс;
  • Робота над цікавими проектами з використанням передових технологій.
     

EN
 

We are looking for a Python Developer (Fullstack з TypeScript) to join the team and contribute to a new project, primarily focusing on backend development.
 

The project involves the use of LLM and AI-driven solutions, requiring a thoughtful approach to architecture, integrations, and the development of scalable services. Within this role, you will participate in shaping technical solutions, developing server-side logic, integrating AI/ML components, and supporting the frontend part when needed (to a lesser extent).
 

Engagement duration — from 3 months with the possibility of extension
 

Requirements:

  • At least 4 years of commercial experience with Python;
  • At least 1 year of experience with TypeScript;
  • Practical experience with LLMs or ML/AI APIs, including LLM-based multi-agent solutions;
  • Deep understanding of scalable backend architecture;
  • Understanding of CI/CD pipelines;
  • Proficient in SQL, including data encryption and security best practices;
  • Expertise in OOP principles and software architecture;
  • Foundational understanding of AI concepts.
     

Responsibilities:

  • Development of backend services and core product logic using Python;
  • Integration and configuration of LLM models;
  • Setup and maintenance of CI/CD processes;
  • Performing small TypeScript tasks for backend data visualization;
  • Collaboration with the team on architecture and development of core system components.
     

We offer:

  • A friendly and highly professional team;
  • Democratic management;
  • Competitive salary;
  • English language lessons;
  • Modern and comfortable office;
  • Work on interesting projects using advanced technologies.

 

Надсилаючи своє резюме, Ви тим самим даєте згоду на обробку своїх особистих персональних даних відповідно до Закону України “Про захист персональних даних” від 01.06.2010 р. № 2297-VІ з метою потенційної подальшої співпраці.

  • Демократичне управління;
  • Конкурентну заробітну плату;
  • Уроки англійської мови;
  • Сучасний та комфортний офіс;
  • Робота над цікавими проектами з використанням передових технологій.

items.title: Strong Middle JavaScript Developer (Pixi.js, Slots)
items.content_html:
У NeverEnding ми створюємо ігри, які дійсно “затягують” - і зараз шукаємо Strong Middle JavaScript Developer, який допоможе нам оживити наші ідеї у вигляді слотів, instant та crash ігор.

 

Це роль для тих, хто хоче створювати нові ігри з нуля, працювати з сучасними технологіями та впливати на те, що бачать і відчувають гравці.

 

Що робити:

  • Розробляти клієнтську частину ігор на JavaScript/TypeScript з використанням Pixi.js.
  • Оптимізувати графіку, анімації та ефекти для швидкої й стабільної роботи на різних пристроях.
  • Інтегрувати ігрову математику та логіку в готовий UI.
  • Працювати разом із гейм-дизайнерами, математиками, художниками та продакт менеджерами для створення цілісного ігрового досвіду.
  • Брати участь у проектуванні архітектури, визначати технічні ризики та пропонувати рішення.
     

Що очікуємо від тебе:

  • 4+ роки досвіду в JavaScript/TypeScript розробці.
  • Досвід роботи з Pixi.js (обов’язково).
  • Практичний досвід у розробці слотів або інших азартних/геймінгових продуктів.
  • Розуміння принципів побудови ігрової архітектури, оптимізації графіки та продуктивності.
  • Досвід роботи з анімаціями, ефектами, інтеграціями API.
  • Англійська мова - B1 (Intermediate)
  • Аналітичне мислення, уважність до деталей, здатність оптимізувати складне.

 

Ми шукаємо людину, яка:

  • Думає як гравець і кодить як інженер.
  • Хоче створювати нові ігри, а не “перемальовувати скіни”.
  • Любить швидкий темп, експерименти й технічні челенджі.
  • Може брати відповідальність за свою частину продукту.

 

Чому варто приєднатися до NeverEnding?

  • Робота з нуля над першими іграми компанії.
  • Вплив на формування ігрової лінійки та технічного напряму.
  • Пряма співпраця з фаундерами та продуктовою командою.
  • Гнучкість, швидкість і відкрите поле для творчості.
  • Стартап із амбіцією стати провайдером нового покоління.
     

📍 Формат: Remote / Hybrid — на твій вибір
🕐 Формат: Повна зайнятість | 40 год/тиждень | 5/2
💰 Зарплата: Конкурентна — обговорюється

 

NeverEnding тільки починається.

 

Tech stack: JavaScript, TypeScript, Pixi.js, WebGL (базово), Git

  • Англійська мова - B1 (Intermediate)
  • Аналітичне мислення, уважність до деталей, здатність оптимізувати складне.

 

Ми шукаємо людину, яка:

  • Думає як гравець і кодить як інженер.
  • Хоче створювати нові ігри, а не “перемальовувати скіни”.
  • Любить швидкий темп, експерименти й технічні челенджі.
  • Може брати відповідальність за свою частину продукту.

 

Чому варто приєднатися до NeverEnding?

  • Робота з нуля над першими іграми компанії.
  • Вплив на формування ігрової лінійки та технічного напряму.
  • Пряма співпраця з фаундерами та продуктовою командою.
  • Гнучкість, швидкість і відкрите поле для творчості.
  • Стартап із амбіцією стати провайдером нового покоління.
     

📍 Формат: Remote / Hybrid — на твій вибір
🕐 Формат: Повна зайнятість | 40 год/тиждень | 5/2
💰 Зарплата: Конкурентна — обговорюється

 

NeverEnding тільки починається.

 

Tech stack: JavaScript, TypeScript, Pixi.js, WebGL (базово), Git

items.title: Middle Frontend Developer
items.content_html:
We are looking for a Middle Frontend Developer with strong implementation skills and clear ownership of features. You will be responsible for delivering high-quality UI components while continuously growing your architectural understanding. The role involves active use of modern frontend practices, attention to detail, and product-oriented thinking.

 

Core Profile

  • Experience: 3–6+ years frontend development on production web applications
  • Education: BS in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience
     

Technology Stack (2025/2026)

  • Languages: Solid JavaScript, practical TypeScript experience (strongly preferred)
  • Frameworks: Proficiency in React 18+/19 (hooks, context, basic Server Components awareness); Vue 3 or Angular 17+ acceptable
  • Meta-frameworks: Experience with Next.js (App Router), Remix, or similar; understanding of SSR/SSG concepts
  • Build tools: Vite (preferred), Webpack; ESLint/Biome for linting; familiarity with modern bundling
  • Testing: Vitest or Jest for unit tests, Testing Library, basic Playwright/Cypress E2E experience
  • Styling: Tailwind CSS, modern CSS (Flexbox, Grid, responsive design), component libraries (shadcn/ui, MUI, etc.)
  • APIs & state: REST/GraphQL integration, authentication flows, TanStack Query or similar data-fetching libraries
  • Accessibility: Semantic HTML, ARIA basics, WCAG 2.2 awareness, keyboard navigation
     

Responsibilities

  • Deliver end-to-end features: requirements analysis, UX discussions, implementation, testing, and production monitoring
  • Write clean, maintainable, well-tested code; participate actively in code reviews
  • Collaborate with designers and backend engineers for seamless integration and high-quality UX
  • Own specific codebase areas: fix bugs, refactor, and improve performance and accessibility
  • Use AI coding assistants (GitHub Copilot, Cursor) effectively to accelerate development
     

Growth & State-of-the-Art Expectations

  • Learn advanced React patterns (Server Components, Suspense, streaming), performance optimization, and comprehensive testing strategies
  • Contribute to technical design discussions; provide input on architecture and tooling under team lead guidance
  • Develop product mindset: understand user flows, track feature metrics, suggest UX improvements
  • Stay current with modern frontend evolution: Core Web Vitals, accessibility standards (EAA compliance), emerging APIs
     

Nice to Have

  • Storybook experience
  • Animation libraries (Framer Motion, GSAP)
  • Monorepo exposure (Nx, Turborepo)
  • Basic backend understanding (Node.js, APIs)
  • CI/CD familiarity
  • Open-source contributions

items.title: Frontend / Mobile Developer (Angular, React, React Native)
items.content_html:
Sprinterra invites you to be part of a team that creates impactful digital products in the healthcare, real estate and other popular domains. We work on dynamic projects and provide a growth-oriented, collaborative environment where your expertise will make a difference.

Job Description:

We are looking for a proactive and independent Frontend / Mobile Developer (Angular + React + React Native) to join our team and take a central role in building and supporting digital solutions.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys ownership, thrives in full-cycle development, and is comfortable working across web and mobile platforms. You will be involved in developing applications from scratch, maintaining and evolving existing codebases, and communicating directly with clients to ensure smooth delivery and an excellent user experience.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Support and maintain existing mobile and web applications using Angular, React and React Native
  • Build and maintain new mobile and web applications from scratch using Angular, React and React Native
  • Plan and execute migrations of applications from older versions of Angular, React, and React Native to the latest stable versions, minimizing risks and downtime
  • Refactor legacy code to improve maintainability, performance, and scalability during migration
  • Design and implement intuitive UI/UX components across platforms
  • Ensure performance, scalability, and cross-platform consistency
  • Communicate directly with stakeholders and clients, gathering requirements and providing updates
  • Collaborate with other developers, QA engineers, and product owners
  • Follow best practices for security and compliance, especially in healthcare contexts

Requirements:

  • 3+ years of professional experience in JavaScript/TypeScript development
  • Proven experience with Angular, React and React Native in production environments
  • Ability to develop applications from scratch and take ownership of technical decisions
  • Hands-on experience migrating applications from legacy versions of Angular, React, and/or React Native
  • Strong understanding of mobile app lifecycle, UI performance optimization, and REST API integration
  • Experience with state management (Redux/MobX/Recoil or similar)
  • Good knowledge of version control tools (Git) and CI/CD workflows
  • Exposure to DevOps tools and cloud deployment (e.g., Firebase, AWS, Fastlane) – basic level
  • Excellent communication skills and fluent English (Upper-Intermediate or higher) – must be able to interact directly with clients
  • Familiarity with security and compliance standards in healthcare (HIPAA, GDPR) is a plus

Nice to Have:

  • Familiarity with analytics, notifications, deep linking, and app store deployments
  • Knowledge of testing frameworks such as Jest, Detox, Cypress, or similar
  • Background working in Agile/Scrum environments
  • UI/UX design skills or experience collaborating closely with designers

items.title: Game Developer / slots / gambling (JavaScript / TypeScript )
items.content_html:
We are looking for a passionate JavaScript / TypeScript Game Developer to join our game development team and work on engaging slot and table games. You will be involved in the full development lifecycle — from concept to release — collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality gaming experiences.

 

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop, test, and release slot and table games across the full development cycle.
  • Collaborate daily with QA and backend teams to ensure smooth integration and delivery.
  • Implement gameplay logic, graphics, animations, and sound using Cocos Creator, with a strong focus on clean and efficient code.
  • Work closely with the Team Lead, providing regular progress updates and proactively seeking guidance when needed.
  • Build new game features and continuously improve existing projects.
  • Ensure compliance with architecture guidelines, functional requirements, and industry standards.
  • Support team members by providing technical guidance and validating implementation quality.
  • Track, update, and report task progress using Jira.

 

Requirements

  • 3+ years of professional experience in game development.
  • Strong proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript.
  • Hands-on experience with Canvas and WebGL.
  • Solid understanding of design patterns, OOP, and MVC principles.
  • Experience with Cocos Creator (preferred) or other game frameworks such as Pixi.js, Phaser, PlayCanvas, Three.js.
  • Experience with Spine is a strong plus.
  • Good knowledge of data structures, algorithms, asynchronous programming, dynamic typing, and performance optimization.
  • Familiarity with modern JavaScript frameworks (MV* concepts).
  • Strong understanding of HTML5 and its latest features.
  • Experience with debugging and profiling browser applications.
  • Confident use of Git and version control workflows.
  • Intermediate or higher English level.
  • Strong communication and teamwork skills.

 

Nice to Have

  • Experience in slot game development within the gambling industry.
  • Familiarity with Gulp or Webpack.
  • Knowledge of programming languages beyond JavaScript / ActionScript.
  • Experience with cross-browser and mobile web development.
  • Understanding of WebGL shaders.

items.title: Senior Frontend Developer (React/Next.js)
items.content_html:
27 Nerds is an IT company based in Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine, with 10+ years building products for esports, gaming, and creators. From Arena27 (esports club network Poland/Ukraine) and Bo3.gg to projects in cybersecurity and e-commerce. Currently developing a white-label platform for bloggers: branded App Store apps with feeds from YouTube/Twitch/Insta/TikTok + chats/content.

 

Looking for Senior Frontend Developer to build Creator & Super Admin web panels for MVP (full-time, over 9-12 weeks), with potential extension.

 

Key responsibilities:

  • Creator Admin Panel: Dashboard (metrics/activity), Content management (upload/schedule photos/videos/text), DM Inbox (fan profiles/messages), Livestream settings (URLs/status), Analytics (growth/engagement), App Settings (branding/social OAuth).
  • Super Admin Panel: Platform dashboard (health/alerts), Creators management (onboard/edit/disable), Users (search/suspend/GDPR), Moderation queue (flagged content), Settings (feature flags/configs).
  • Backend API integration (OpenAPI 3.0), responsive data-heavy UI (tables/charts/filters), authentication flows.

  • Build reusable components, optimize performance, ensure mobile responsiveness.

     

Requirements:

  • 4+ years React/Next.js TypeScript production experience.
  • Complex data dashboards with state management (React Query/Zustand/Redux).
  • REST API integration, authentication (JWT), client-side routing.
  • Modern CSS (Tailwind/CSS-in-JS), responsive design, Figma-to-code.

  • English B1+ (API docs, code reviews, team syncs).

     

Nice to have:

  • Charting libraries (Recharts/Chart.js), admin panel experience.
  • Design systems, component libraries.

  • Esports/media platform UIs.

     

What we offer:

  • Full-time engagement — core team member for 3-month sprint
  • Real App Store impact — admin panels power creators' app management
  • Senior team: Tech Lead Architect, 2 Backend, DevOps (AWS cert), QA, PM
  • Modern stack: React/Next.js → Node.js/NestJS APIs → PostgreSQL/Redis → AWS
  • Long-term potential (Phase 2+ payments, advanced analytics)

  • Remote/hybrid (Ivano-Frankivsk)

     

Technical challenges you'll solve:

  • Data-heavy dashboards (real-time metrics, 1000s of records filtering/pagination)
  • Complex workflows (content upload + moderation queue management)
  • Multi-tenant admin UX (creator-specific vs platform-wide views)
  • Responsive admin for desktop/tablet (creator usage patterns)

 

Join 27 Nerds to build powerful admin tools for the creator economy! 🚀

items.title: Senior Webflow Developer
items.content_html:
Digis is looking for a Senior Webflow Developer to join a long-term partnership with a US-based innovator transforming how consumers access aesthetics, telehealth, and pharmacy services.

About the Project
The client is building trusted, patient-first brands that deliver results across verticals like medical weight loss, hormone therapy, and wellness. The project is in an active scaling and optimization phase.
We are looking for a Webflow expert with a strong CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) mindset who can drive velocity and maintain a high bar for quality.

Responsibilities
 

  • Build & Iterate: Develop high-converting landing and marketing pages in Webflow from scratch or based on existing frameworks.
  • CRO Execution: Implement A/B test variants and experiment-ready structures.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with the Head of Web, CRO specialists, Designers, and Analytics teams to support rapid testing cycles.
     

Requirements
 

  • Experience: 5+ years with Webflow.
  • CRO Mindset: practical experience in experimentation environments and conversion-focused front-end execution.
  • English Level: High proficiency (Advanced/Upper-Intermediate) for frequent technical meetings and direct collaboration with the US-based leadership.
     

Why Join Us
 

  • High-Impact Work: Your contributions directly drive the growth of a leading US health-tech platform used by thousands.
  • Ownership: Move beyond pure execution; take responsibility for the data-driven evolution of the marketing platform.
  • Stability: A long-term project with a clear product roadmap and a stable, successful history.
     

We Offer
 

  • 20 paid vacation days per year.
  • 5 paid sick leaves per year (no medical documents required).
  • Personalized development plan with training compensation.
  • English courses compensation.
  • Work equipment if needed (PC / laptop / monitor).
  • Full accounting and legal support.

items.title: Frontend Engineer (React.js) / Middle+
items.content_html:
We’re looking for a skilled Frontend Engineer (Middle+) to join a product team building a web platform for law firms with a strong focus on AI, automations, and complex forms.

 

This is a product-driven role where speed, ownership, and practical decision-making matter more than formal processes.

 

What you’ll be working on

 

  • Building and evolving complex React.js web applications
  • Implementing AI-driven flows, automations, and smart user interactions
  • Developing dynamic forms, dashboards, and internal tools
  • Quickly turning ideas into working UI using AI / vibe-coding approaches
  • Designing and polishing small UI elements (buttons, modals, windows, layouts) without a designer
  • Improving UX iteratively based on product needs, not pixel-perfect specs

 

 

 

What we expect from you

 

  • Strong hands-on experience with React.js (Middle+ or higher)
  • Solid understanding of modern frontend architecture
  • Experience working with forms, state management, and complex UI logic
  • Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude code, etc.) to move faster
  • Good visual sense and ability to design small UI parts independently with AI help
  • Ability to work autonomously and take ownership
  • English level: B2 or higher (you’ll collaborate with an international team)

 

 

 

Nice to have

 

  • Experience with AI products or automation-heavy platforms
  • Familiarity with Next.js, modern build tools, or component libraries
  • Understanding of product-thinking (not just “task execution”)

 

 

 

What you’ll get

 

  • Work on a real product, not client outsourcing
  • High level of autonomy and trust
  • Fast feedback, minimal bureaucracy
  • Opportunity to influence product decisions and UX
  • Team that values speed, pragmatism, and smart use of AI
items.summary:
We’re looking for a skilled Frontend Engineer (Middle+) to join a product team building a web platform for law firms with a strong focus on AI, automations, and complex forms.

 

This is a product-driven role where speed, ownership, and practical decision-making matter more than formal processes.

 

What you’ll be working on

 

  • Building and evolving complex React.js web applications
  • Implementing AI-driven flows, automations, and smart user interactions
  • Developing dynamic forms, dashboards, and internal tools
  • Quickly turning ideas into working UI using AI / vibe-coding approaches
  • Designing and polishing small UI elements (buttons, modals, windows, layouts) without a designer
  • Improving UX iteratively based on product needs, not pixel-perfect specs

 

 

 

What we expect from you

 

  • Strong hands-on experience with React.js (Middle+ or higher)
  • Solid understanding of modern frontend architecture
  • Experience working with forms, state management, and complex UI logic
  • Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude code, etc.) to move faster
  • Good visual sense and ability to design small UI parts independently with AI help
  • Ability to work autonomously and take ownership
  • English level: B2 or higher (you’ll collaborate with an international team)

 

 

 

Nice to have

 

  • Experience with AI products or automation-heavy platforms
  • Familiarity with Next.js, modern build tools, or component libraries
  • Understanding of product-thinking (not just “task execution”)

 

 

 

What you’ll get

 

  • Work on a real product, not client outsourcing
  • High level of autonomy and trust
  • Fast feedback, minimal bureaucracy
  • Opportunity to influence product decisions and UX
  • Team that values speed, pragmatism, and smart use of AI

items.title: Senior Frontend Developer (React)
items.content_html:
Weblium — SaaS-платформа, інтуїтивний конструктор веб-сайтів, який дозволяє користувачам створювати професійні та естетично привабливі сайти без спеціальних знань в області програмування.

Це long-term позиція в команду, що створює якісний український продукт, який динамічно розвивається і має актуальний стек, без легаcі та нудного саппорту.

 

Обов'язки:

- Розробка нового та підтримка наявного функціоналу конструктора.

- Взаємодія з дизайнерами та back-end розробниками для забезпечення оптимальної взаємодії та відповідності дизайну.

- Впровадження нових функціональних можливостей та оптимізація існуючого коду для підвищення продуктивності та ефективності.

- Забезпечення високої якості коду, тестування та документації

 

Вимоги:

- Досвід роботи з React та Redux від 4 років.

- Глибокі знання JavaScript (ES2015-2022).

- Розуміння принципів роботи з REST API.

- Вміння працювати в команді та готовність навчатися.

- Відмінні комунікаційні навички та уважність до деталей.

- Досвід роботи зі збіркою веб-додатків за допомогою Webpack або інших інструментів.

 

Буде перевагою:

- Досвід роботи в продуктових компаніях.

 

Ми пропонуємо:

- Конкурентну заробітну плату та можливість кар'єрного росту.

- Дружню та професійну робочу атмосферу.

- Гнучкий графік роботи та можливість дистанційної роботи.

- Можливість впливати на розвиток продукту та вносити свої ідеї.

- 3 календарних тижні відпустки, тиждень лікарняних без довідки.

 

Якщо ти прагнеш приєднатися до команди талановитих фахівців, яка працює над якісним і динамічним продуктом, та хочеш зробити свій внесок у розвиток української ІТ-галузі, тоді відправляй своє CV! :)

items.title: Frontend Engineer
items.content_html:
Responsibilities

 

  • Develop web-based slot games using our proprietary SDK (Svelte + PixiJS + TypeScript)
  • Implement game mechanics by translating bookEvents (math outputs) into emitterEvents (UI interactions)
  • Build responsive, performant canvas-based components for desktop and mobile
  • Create and maintain reusable components in our Turborepo monorepo structure
  • Integrate Spine animations and visual effects into game flows
  • Write Storybook stories for component testing and documentation
  • Manage complex game states using XState finite state machines
  • Optimize PixiJS rendering performance and debug cross-browser issues
  • Collaborate with backend engineers and designers to implement game features
  • Participate in code reviews and maintain high code quality standards

 

Requirements

 

  • 4+ years of professional frontend development experience
  • Strong TypeScript skills (advanced types, generics, union types)
  • Expert-level Svelte knowledge (Svelte 5, runes, context API, reactivity)
  • Experience with PixiJS or similar canvas libraries (Three.js, Phaser, CreateJS)
  • Deep understanding of event-driven architecture and pub/sub patterns
  • Proficiency with async/await, Promises, and asynchronous event handling
  • Experience with Git workflows and code collaboration

 

Strong Plus

 

  • XState or other state machine libraries
  • Monorepo tools (Turborepo, Nx, pnpm workspaces)
  • Storybook for component development
  • Game development or interactive entertainment background
  • Spine or skeletal animation systems
  • Canvas performance optimization (FPS, memory management)

 

Nice to Have

 

  • SvelteKit framework
  • RGS (Remote Game Server) integration experience
  • Gambling industry knowledge
  • CI/CD pipeline experience

items.title: Regular/Senior Web Graphics Developer
items.content_html:
• Project Description:

    We are seeking a skilled Regular - Senior Web Graphics Developer to join our team in the oil and gas industry. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in developing advanced web-based visualizations and a deep understanding of industry standards. This role requires proficiency in HTML5 Canvas, D3.js, and Angular, along with a strong grasp of the graphics rendering pipeline. Experience with Unity or VR is a plus. Additionally, the candidate should possess general cloud development skills and backend expertise, including microservices architecture and experience with AWS and Azure.

     

  • Responsibilities:

    • Design, develop, and maintain interactive web-based visualization tools for oil and gas data.
    • Implement advanced graphics rendering techniques using HTML5 Canvas and D3.js
    • Collaborate with geologists, engineers, and other stakeholders to understand visualization requirements and deliver effective solutions.
    • Ensure visualizations are optimized for performance and scalability.
    • Stay up-to-date with industry standards and best practices in web visualization and graphics rendering.
    • Integrate visualization tools with existing data management systems and workflows.
    • Develop and maintain backend services using microservices architecture.
    • Utilize cloud platforms such as AWS and Azure for deployment and management of visualization tools.
    • Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior developers.

     

  • Mandatory Skills Description:

    • 4+ years in Graphics development, with a strong emphasis on web-based Visualization applications and tools.
    • Proven experience in web-based visualization development, particularly in the oil and gas industry.
    • Strong proficiency in HTML5 Canvas and D3.js
    • In-depth knowledge of the graphics rendering pipeline.
    • Proficiency in cloud platforms such as AWS and Azure.
    • Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
    • Strong communication and collaboration skills.
    • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
